caption: The video shows a person streaming a session of a game, likely FIFA Ultimate Team, as indicated by the "Auctions & Trades" menu on the screen. The streamer is wearing headphones and appears to be engaged in the game, possibly discussing or reacting to the auction house interface. The game's user interface displays various options such as "My Auctions," "My Bids," "My Trade Block," and "My Trade Offers." The streamer's environment includes a decorated Christmas tree in the background, suggesting that the video was recorded during the holiday season. The player's in-game currency and level are also visible, showing they have a significant amount of in-game money and are at level 19 with an overall rating of 91. The streamer seems to be actively navigating through the auction house, potentially looking for items to bid on or manage their trades.
